sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n59164" key="ko/rshs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κόρσ-ης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, nickname of the first man <sense id="n59164.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">who shaved his beard</tr_> at Athens, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1264.tlg001:3:198" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Chrysipp.Stoic.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.198</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
